ddls:
CREATE TABLE "problems" (
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each problem */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the problem */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the problem */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the problem (e.g., Easy, Medium, Hard) */,
  "success_rate" REAL /* Success rate of the problem (calculated as successful submissions / total attempts) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the problem was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the problem was last updated */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Topic of the problem (e.g., Algorithms, Data Structures) */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the problem (e.g., string manipulation, graph traversal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("problem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the submission */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem being solved */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the submission was made */,
  "success" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the submission was successful */,
  "language" TEXT /* Programming language used for the submission */,
  "code" TEXT /* Code submitted by the user */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Time taken to execute the submission */,
  "memory_used" INTEGER /* Memory used by the submission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES problems ("problem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "success_rate" REAL /* Overall success rate of the user (calculated as successful submissions / total attempts) */,
  "num_submissions" INTEGER /* Number of submissions made by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, moderator, user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboard" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "ranking" INTEGER /* Ranking of the user on the leaderboard */,
  "score" REAL /* Score of the user on the leaderboard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "problem_topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "problem_problem_topics" (
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("problem_id", "topic_id")
)
